subcodes.first_line: There are seven general stages. The first is the stage of the inorganic being. From the mineral kingdom, it ascendeth to the stage of the plant
subcodes.first_line_orig: مراتب سبعة کلیة‌الاولی رتبة‌الجماد فاذا استعرج رتبة الحدودیة عن مقام المعدنیة هنالک یتصل الی مقام النبات
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @evolution; human evolution, @seven stages of creation, @spiritual transformation, @presence of; reunion with God
